elmwood.label: Elmwood
elmwood.blurb: Tree-lined streets and walkable blocks — the heart of the portfolio, with renovated residences a short walk from the market square.

harbourton.label: Harbourton
harbourton.blurb: A working waterfront town — quiet residential streets, a short walk from the quay and the morning ferry.
